mapper.select: INSERT INTO attendances ( session_id, user_id, status, checked_in_at, method, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{checkedInAt}, #{method}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (session_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, checked_in_at = EXCLUDED.checked_in_at, method = EXCLUDED.method, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id

INSERT INTO word_entries ( session_id, user_id, phrase, example, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{phrase}, #{example}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (session_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET phrase = EXCLUDED.phrase, example = EXCLUDED.example, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at RETURNING id

SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, status, checked_in_at AS checkedInAt, method, created_at AS createdAt FROM attendances WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY checked_in_at ASC
SELECT S.ID AS sessionId, S.TITLE AS title, S.STARTS_AT AS startsAt, S.LOCATION AS location FROM SESSIONS S WHERE S.STATUS = 'OPEN' ORDER BY S.STARTS_AT ASC
SELECT U.ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM USERS U WHERE U.NAME = #{name} AND U.NICKNAME = #{nickname} LIMIT 1
